title: PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page » Successor
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page to show the connected PROGRAMME EPISODE
So I can ...
description:
* The PROGRAMME EPISODE detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected PROGRAMME EPISODE.
* The PROGRAMME EPISODE is presented with its name and primary information.
* The PROGRAMME EPISODE contains a link to its detail page.
* The PROGRAMME EPISODE has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no PROGRAMME EPISODE connected to the PROGRAMME EPISODE then the section is not displayed at all.
